description: Ground truth transcriptions for 20 self-recorded ASR evaluation samples
target_domain: Bangalore locality names in conversational speech

recordings.reference_transcript: Haan main Koramangala mein rehta hoon
recordings.speaker: self
recordings.notes: Clear, slow, conversational

recordings.reference_transcript: Mera ghar Indiranagar ke paas hai
recordings.speaker: self
recordings.notes: Natural pace

recordings.reference_transcript: Office Whitefield mein hai yaar
recordings.speaker: self
recordings.notes: Recorded near road or with traffic audio in background

recordings.reference_transcript: Main Electronic City se aa raha hoon
recordings.speaker: self
recordings.notes: Two-word locality name — tests segmentation

recordings.reference_transcript: Bhai Marathahalli bridge ke paas milte hain
recordings.speaker: self
recordings.notes: Background chatter/crowd noise

recordings.reference_transcript: Jayanagar fourth block mein rehta hoon main
recordings.speaker: self
recordings.notes: Natural word order inversion at end

recordings.reference_transcript: Rajajinagar se auto lena padega
recordings.speaker: self
recordings.notes: Speak fast, like you're in a hurry

recordings.reference_transcript: Hebbal flyover ke paas hoon abhi
recordings.speaker: self
recordings.notes: Short utterance — tests brevity handling

recordings.reference_transcript: Main Yelahanka New Town mein rehta hoon
recordings.speaker: self
recordings.notes: Three-word locality variant

recordings.reference_transcript: Banashankari bus stop ke paas hun
recordings.speaker: self
recordings.notes: Whispered — stress test for noise-sensitive models

recordings.reference_transcript: HSR Layout sector two mein flat chahiye
recordings.speaker: self
recordings.notes: Abbreviation + English word — tests code-switching

recordings.reference_transcript: BTM Layout mein room milega kya
recordings.speaker: self
recordings.notes: Simulate phone call: record in bathroom or with slight reverb

recordings.reference_transcript: Majestic se bus pakadni hai abhi
recordings.speaker: self
recordings.notes: Common colloquial name for Kempegowda Bus Station

recordings.reference_transcript: Silk Board junction pe jam hai bhai
recordings.speaker: self
recordings.notes: Very recognizable Bangalore landmark — good sanity check

recordings.reference_transcript: Bellandur ke paas kaam dhundh raha hoon
recordings.speaker: self
recordings.notes: Natural, slightly longer sentence

recordings.reference_transcript: Sarjapur road pe flat lena hai
recordings.speaker: self
recordings.notes: Second whisper sample — different locality

recordings.reference_transcript: Byatarayanapura mein rehta hoon main
recordings.speaker: self
recordings.notes: HARDEST name — 7 syllables, Kannada origin. Key test case.

recordings.reference_transcript: KR Puram station ke paas milte hain
recordings.speaker: self
recordings.notes: Initialism — does model spell it K R Puram or Krishnarajapuram?

recordings.reference_transcript: Peenya industrial area mein job hai
recordings.speaker: self
recordings.notes: Short name, rushed — easy locality but hard condition

recordings.reference_transcript: Thanisandra main road pe rehta hoon
recordings.speaker: self
recordings.notes: Less common locality — tests model vocabulary coverage

friend_recordings.reference_transcript: Haan main Koramangala mein rehti hoon
friend_recordings.speaker: friend_1

friend_recordings.reference_transcript: HSR Layout sector two mein flat chahiye
friend_recordings.speaker: friend_1

friend_recordings.reference_transcript: Haan main Koramangala mein rehta hoon
friend_recordings.speaker: friend_2
friend_recordings.notes: Friend 2 — ideally different regional accent from Friend 1

friend_recordings.reference_transcript: HSR Layout sector two mein flat chahiye
friend_recordings.speaker: friend_2
